items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly validate the requirement of the scenario 'Extension uninstall revokes all access'. While the expected result mentions confirming the scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there are no prior steps or evidence that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or operational. Therefore, the assessment cannot definitively conclude whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
